scripts.copy-assets: mkdir -p runtime-assets/flux-klein-server && if [ -f ../flux-klein-server/server.py ]; then cp ../flux-klein-server/server.py ../flux-klein-server/pipeline.py ../flux-klein-server/config.py ../flux-klein-server/requirements.txt runtime-assets/flux-klein-server/ && cp ../scripts/setup-flux-klein.sh runtime-assets/setup-flux-klein.sh; else echo 'Source assets not reachable (Railway build); using committed runtime-assets/'; fi
